articles.summary: Are you an AI startup that's just about to launch or ready to scale? Now is the time to apply to the Google for Startups Cloud Program [4]:

articles.title: ✅ Up to $350K in cloud credits over 2 years
✅ Access to technical training and labs
ALPHAPROOF
articles.summary: DeepMind has combined a pre-trained Gemini-style language model with an AlphaGo-style RL algorithm to train a model to solve International Mathematics Olympiad (IMO) problems at a silver medal level. The system solved 4/6 problems in this year's challenge.

articles.title: SEARCHGPT
articles.summary: OpenAI is testing out a prototype search system.

articles.title: MICROSOFT IS ADDING AI-POWERED SUMMARIES TO BING SEARCH RESULTS
articles.summary: Microsoft has introduced Bing generative search, which delivers AI-composed responses as primary results while citing source links and related content. The feature is in preview and limited to a few user queries. A broader rollout will depend on feedback and performance. The move follows Google's addition of AI Overviews and signals intensifying competition in AI-enhanced search tools.

articles.title: THE UNIT-SCALED MAXIMAL UPDATE PARAMETRIZATION
articles.summary: muP is a way to ensure that a model's hyperparameters are independent of the model's size. This work also ensures that you can transfer across quantized models.

articles.title: IMAGE DEBLURRING
articles.summary: LoFormer captures both low- and high-frequency details effectively, ensuring better global modeling without sacrificing fine-grained details.

articles.title: IMPROVED RAINDROP REMOVAL
articles.summary: Raindrop Clarity is a new large-scale dataset designed to address the limitations of existing raindrop removal datasets. It features 15,186 image pairs/triplets, including both raindrop-focused and background-focused images, in both daytime and nighttime conditions.

articles.title: BUILDING A GENERATIVE AI PLATFORM
articles.summary: This blog post outlines common themes in building generative AI systems. It covers many of the building blocks a company should consider when deploying its models to production.

articles.title: A PYTHON LIBRARY FOR DEEP ORDINAL CLASSIFICATION
articles.summary: dlordinal is a new Python library built on PyTorch that brings together the latest deep learning techniques for ordinal classification.

articles.title: PREDICTING HUMAN MOTION
articles.summary: The Trajectory2Pose model is a tool for long-term, multi-agent human pose forecasting. It uses a novel graph-based interaction module to improve the prediction of human motion over long timescales and among multiple agents.

articles.title: 3D GAUSSIAN SPLATTING: A SURVEY
articles.summary: This survey analyzes 3DGS-related research from multiple perspectives, including tasks, technologies, challenges, and opportunities.

articles.title: ELON MUSK'S NEURALINK EMPLOYEES WANT TO CASH OUT
THE AI BOYFRIEND BUSINESS IS BOOMING
articles.summary: A growing number of women are seeking connection and comfort in relationships with chatbots — and finding their approximation of empathy more dependable than many human partners' support. These female AI users, who are flipping the stereotype of under-socialized men chatting with AI girlfriends in their parents' basement, are challenging assumptions about the nature of human intimacy.

articles.title: GPT VOICE COMING NEXT WEEK
articles.summary: Sam Altman confirmed on X that OpenAI's new voice interface will be available to ChatGPT Plus subscribers next week.

articles.title: OPENAI ANNOUNCES FREE FINE-TUNING FOR GPT-4O MINI MODEL
articles.summary: OpenAI has introduced free fine-tuning for its GPT-4o mini model to Tier 4 and 5 users, with plans to extend it to all tiers, until September 23.

articles.title: FRIEND - OPEN SOURCE AI NECKLACE (PRODUCT LAUNCH)
articles.summary: Friend is an open-source personal AI that listens, remembers conversations, takes notes, and prepares tasks for you.
